Game.Name: Street Fighter Zero 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: The bad boys from the Street Fighter series are back for more fisticuffs of fury! Eighteen different combatants, some old and some new, are here to lay claim to the title 'World's Best.' Screamin' moves like Ken's Dragon Punch, Adon's Jaguar Tooth and M. Bison's Somersault Skull Driver will blow you away! Play alone or pummel a friend in two-player simultaneous action. This ain't no cakewalk. This is Street Fight Alpha 2 and it's blazing on your Super NES!Cheat: Fight against Shin AkumaBeat the game without losing a round with 5 or more perfect victories or using a continue.Cheat: Fight against Shin AkumaWhen playing in Arcade Mode, win your first five matches with five or more Custom Comb or Super Combo finishes on any round. If done successfully, you'll then face a mid-level rival before your sixth match (for example, if you play as Ryu, you mid-level rival would be Sakura, if you play as Sagat, your mid-level rival would be Adon).
